description.unified: Dispels negative effects from self and allies, and summons the soul of Flowing Circle, Eltoirre for 12sec, healing all allies for [???->120% of ATK] and recovering [400->40] Mana every sec.

Deals Physical DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area and stuns them for [3 sec->1sec]. Non-hero enemies take additional Physical DMG. [Experiment Success!]: This skill does not trigger a cooldown.

Deals Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting [Explosive Substance] for [10 sec->7sec], increasing Physical DMG taken by 20% and inflicting Blind for [4 sec->1sec]. [Experiment Success!]: Removes beneficial effects from enemies within the area.

Attaches a sticky bomb to a random enemy. After 3sec, the bomb explodes, dealing Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, and stunning them for [3 sec->1sec]. Enemies afflicted with [Explosive Substance] take additional Physical DMG. [Experiment Success!]: The bomb explodes immediately upon attachment.

light.unified: When performing a Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to fire a shell, dealing Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, and stunning them for [2 sec->1sec]. Each time a skill ends, attempts [Experiment] with a 50% chance to succeed, enhancing the next skill. Enhanced skills do not attempt [Experiment].
Increases the duration of Blind by [2 sec->1 sec].
Mana cost increases by [1->2000], and the number of bomb placements is [changed to 2->attacks a random target 2 times].

description.unified: [Experiment] success chance increases by {0}%. On [Experiment] success, Attack increases by {1}%, Attack Speed increases by {2}% and damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by {3}%. This effect stacks up to [4->3] times and cannot be dispelled.
[Smoke Bomb] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases the duration of Blind by {0} sec.
[Glue Bomb] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces the Heal Rate of the hit target by {0}% for 7 sec.

dark.unified: Shell activation chance increases by [10%->25%], and stun duration increases by [1 sec->0.5 sec].

description.unified: On [Experiment] success, increases Attack Speed by [300->12%] and Status Ailment Accuracy by [(added) 150] for 10 sec.
Summons the soul of Lakrak MK-1 for [12 sec->12sec], dealing P.DMG 5times every 4sec to enemies around a random target, stunning them for 2sec and increasing P.DMG they take by 30% for 8sec.

1.from: Reduces Skill Activation requirements by 2 sec and gains immunity to CC for 12 sec.
1.to: Becomes immune to CC for 6 sec.
1.unified: Becomes immune to CC for [12 sec->6 sec].

2.from: Reduces Skill Activation requirements by an additional 4 sec, and immediately reduces Cooldown of all Skills by 3 sec every 4 sec.
2.to: Every 4 sec, reduces cooldown of all skills by 2 sec.
2.unified: Every 4 sec, reduces cooldown of all skills by [3 sec->2 sec]. [(removed) Reduces Skill Activation requirements by an additional 4 sec]
